response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content: Found it to be a live concert performance followed by an interview.
2. Identified song: Used on-screen text '#博衣こより生誕Live2026' and the song title "不安定な神様" to confirm the song.
3. Identified performers: Visually recognized Hakui Koyori and identified the guest as Suara based on the dialogue.
4. Performed searches: Used the query "不安定な神様 Suara Japanese and English lyrics" to get the song metadata and a representative portion of the lyrics.
5. Constructed the JSON: Created the scenes and populated the fields.
response.global_summary: This video features a live concert performance of the song "不安定な神様" (Unstable God) by Suara and VTuber Hakui Koyori, followed by an interview/dialogue segment between the two performers.

scenes.description: Suara and Hakui Koyori perform "不安定な神様" on a concert stage. The song title and performers are hinted at by the on-screen text, and they confirm their identities later in the video.
scenes.song_title: 不安定な神様 (Fuantei na Kamisama)

scenes.description: Dialogue/interview segment where Suara and Hakui Koyori discuss the performance and their connection to the song and game series.
